summary: Iteration 36: Comprehensive testing of NewAppointmentDialog and EditAppointmentDialog improvements on both DESKTOP (1920x800) and MOBILE (390x844) viewports. All requested features verified working: fixed footer buttons, expandable accordion service categories, price/duration summary in footer, INCASSA checkout flow.
passed_tests: === DESKTOP (1920x800) NewAppointmentDialog ===
1. Dialog opens via 'Nuovo' button - PASS
2. Dialog title 'Nuovo Appuntamento' visible - PASS
3. Fixed footer with 'Salva Appuntamento' button at y=703 (lower half of 800px viewport) - PASS
4. All 6 service categories found as accordion blocks: taglio, piega, trattamento, colore, permanente, stiratura - PASS
5. Categories are expandable - clicking toggles open/close - PASS
6. Services visible after expanding category (2 services in taglio) - PASS
7. Footer shows service count + duration + price summary ('1 servizio - 10 min €10.00') - PASS
8. 'Occasionale' button works - pre-fills name with 'Cliente Occasionale' - PASS
9. Create appointment with Occasionale client works end-to-end - PASS
10. Success toast 'Appuntamento creato!' appears - PASS
11. Dialog closes after successful save - PASS
=== DESKTOP (1920x800) EditAppointmentDialog ===
1. Dialog opens by clicking existing appointment - PASS
2. Dialog title 'Modifica Appuntamento' visible - PASS
3. Fixed footer with Elimina/Annulla/Salva buttons at y=711 - PASS
4. All 6 service categories found as accordion blocks - PASS
5. Categories are expandable - PASS
6. Services visible after expanding (9 services in taglio) - PASS
7. Footer shows service count + duration + price summary - PASS
8. INCASSA button opens checkout section with 'INCASSO' title - PASS
9. Checkout has 'Contanti' payment button - PASS
10. Checkout has 'CONFERMA PAGAMENTO' button - PASS
11. Update appointment works - toast 'Appuntamento aggiornato!' - PASS
12. Delete appointment works - toast 'Appuntamento eliminato!' - PASS
=== MOBILE (390x844) NewAppointmentDialog ===
1. Dialog opens via 'Nuovo' button - PASS
2. Dialog title 'Nuovo Appuntamento' visible - PASS
3. Fixed footer with 'Salva Appuntamento' at y=744 (bottom of 844px viewport) - PASS
4. All 6 service categories found as accordion blocks - PASS
5. Categories are expandable - PASS
6. Services visible after expanding (2 services) - PASS
7. Footer shows service summary ('1 servizio - 10 min €10.00') - PASS
=== MOBILE (390x844) EditAppointmentDialog ===
1. Dialog opens by clicking appointment block - PASS
2. Dialog title 'Modifica Appuntamento' visible - PASS
3. Fixed footer with Elimina button at y=752 - PASS
4. All 6 service categories found as accordion blocks - PASS
5. Categories are expandable - PASS
6. Services visible after expanding (9 services) - PASS
7. Footer shows service summary - PASS
8. INCASSA checkout flow works on mobile - PASS
9. 'CONFERMA PAGAMENTO' button found on mobile - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Excellent implementation of fixed footer using 'shrink-0' class and flex layout. Footer is outside scrollable area.
EditAppointmentDialog.jsx: Same pattern applied correctly. Footer with Elimina/Annulla/Salva buttons always visible.
Both dialogs: Accordion categories implemented with data-testid attributes (toggle-cat-{catKey} for new, edit-toggle-cat-{catKey} for edit).
Both dialogs: Service summary in footer shows count, duration, and price correctly.
Both dialogs: DialogContent uses p-0 with border-b on header for clean separation.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test appointment with 'Cliente Occasionale' during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 verified all dialog improvements on both desktop and mobile. Key features working: 1) Fixed footer with buttons always visible at bottom. 2) Accordion service categories with data-testid='toggle-cat-{catKey}' (new) and 'edit-toggle-cat-{catKey}' (edit). 3) Footer shows service count, duration, price summary. 4) INCASSA checkout flow works. 5) Create/Update/Delete appointment flows all working. No issues found.

desktop_new_dialog.fixed_footer: VERIFIED - Save button at y=703 on 800px viewport

desktop_edit_dialog.incassa_flow: VERIFIED - Opens checkout with payment options

mobile_new_dialog.fixed_footer: VERIFIED - Save button at y=744 on 844px viewport
